testcase.name: test_cohort_preview_one_timer

failure.message: AssertionError: one_timer preview count low: {'cohort': {'id': 'one_timer', 'name': 'One-Timer · Overall', 'tree': {'op': 'AND', 'rules': [{'field': 'lifecycle', 'operator': 'in', 'value': ['one_timer']}]}}, 'matched_total': 568982, 'reach': {'whatsapp': 568982, 'sms': 568982, 'email': 0, 'opted_out': 0}, 'sample': [{'mobile': '6000013876', 'city': None, 'first_purchase_at': '2022-10-28T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': '3fd5b33cf7f14b0a810f632a26031368', 'last_visit_at': '2022-10-28T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 13920.0, 'name': 'KARAN SINGH', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}, {'mobile': '6000047990', 'city': None, 'first_purchase_at': '2024-08-02T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': '64b7bba634ca41d2893da30702fa4181', 'last_visit_at': '2024-08-02T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 2690.0, 'name': 'SANTANA', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}, {'mobile': '6000052733', 'city': None, 'first_purchase_at': '2022-02-18T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': 'd661553d13074458834eaf9f244fb4a3', 'last_visit_at': '2022-02-18T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 2495.0, 'name': 'SIDDARH BARBHUIYA', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}, {'mobile': '6000062369', 'city': 'Hojai', 'first_purchase_at': '2025-12-18T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': '33b3dd59b5b34725bf342c14def5aab8', 'last_visit_at': '2025-12-18T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 2695.0, 'name': 'Kangkana .', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}, {'mobile': '6000064746', 'city': None, 'first_purchase_at': '2021-08-14T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': '5ed2701e746e4d44a7345287c3524cc5', 'last_visit_at': '2021-08-14T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 1690.0, 'name': 'apsara', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}], 'compiled_filter': {'$and': [{'$or': [{'visit_count': 1}]}]}} assert (None)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/iteration72_perf_ai_brain_test.py:140: in test_cohort_preview_one_timer assert count and count > 100000, f"one_timer preview count low: {body}" E AssertionError: one_timer preview count low: {'cohort': {'id': 'one_timer', 'name': 'One-Timer · Overall', 'tree': {'op': 'AND', 'rules': [{'field': 'lifecycle', 'operator': 'in', 'value': ['one_timer']}]}}, 'matched_total': 568982, 'reach': {'whatsapp': 568982, 'sms': 568982, 'email': 0, 'opted_out': 0}, 'sample': [{'mobile': '6000013876', 'city': None, 'first_purchase_at': '2022-10-28T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': '3fd5b33cf7f14b0a810f632a26031368', 'last_visit_at': '2022-10-28T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 13920.0, 'name': 'KARAN SINGH', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}, {'mobile': '6000047990', 'city': None, 'first_purchase_at': '2024-08-02T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': '64b7bba634ca41d2893da30702fa4181', 'last_visit_at': '2024-08-02T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 2690.0, 'name': 'SANTANA', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}, {'mobile': '6000052733', 'city': None, 'first_purchase_at': '2022-02-18T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': 'd661553d13074458834eaf9f244fb4a3', 'last_visit_at': '2022-02-18T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 2495.0, 'name': 'SIDDARH BARBHUIYA', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}, {'mobile': '6000062369', 'city': 'Hojai', 'first_purchase_at': '2025-12-18T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': '33b3dd59b5b34725bf342c14def5aab8', 'last_visit_at': '2025-12-18T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 2695.0, 'name': 'Kangkana .', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}, {'mobile': '6000064746', 'city': None, 'first_purchase_at': '2021-08-14T00:00:00+00:00', 'id': '5ed2701e746e4d44a7345287c3524cc5', 'last_visit_at': '2021-08-14T00:00:00+00:00', 'lifetime_spend': 1690.0, 'name': 'apsara', 'tier': 'silver', 'visit_count': 1}], 'compiled_filter': {'$and': [{'$or': [{'visit_count': 1}]}]}} E assert (None)
